sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33522" key="e)legi/ambos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλεγίαμβος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, the verse <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">̄̆̆̄̆̆̄̆̄̆̄̆</pron>, Mar.Vict.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg002:p.145K" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.145K.</biblScope> </bibl> </entryFree>
